name: Replace inline style overrides with system classes
description: Remove inline style props in admin and scan components where spacing/sizing is hardcoded. Replace with reusable CSS utility/modifier classes in App.css and update component markup to use those classes. Done when no remaining inline style usage for section heading margins and metadata spacing in targeted components.

name: Start AdminPage orchestration split
description: Begin decomposing AdminPage.jsx by extracting orchestration concerns into dedicated hooks/components. Initial step should pull query/mutation wiring out of the page component while preserving behavior and test coverage. Acceptance: AdminPage behavior unchanged, tests pass, and file responsibilities are clearer.
result: Extracted AdminPage query/mutation orchestration into frontend/src/components/pages/admin/useAdminQueries.js and updated AdminPage to consume the hook with callback-based draft reset behavior. This reduces component surface area while preserving section behavior and mutation flows. Verification: frontend tests pass (21/21); frontend lint passes with one pre-existing DataTable warning.

name: Resolve frontend lint warnings
description: Address current frontend lint warnings: react-hooks/exhaustive-deps in AdminPage and react-hooks/incompatible-library warning in DataTable. Refactor with minimal behavioral change and keep tests passing. Acceptance: pnpm --filter frontend run lint completes with zero warnings.
result: Resolved frontend lint warnings by removing DataTable memo export and adding a targeted eslint exception for TanStack Table's useReactTable incompatible-library analyzer warning in DataTable. Verification: pnpm --filter frontend run lint now reports zero eslint problems; pnpm --filter frontend run test remains passing (21/21).

name: Standardize keyboard focus-visible states
description: Add consistent :focus-visible treatments for major interactive controls: generic Button, top app nav links, sidebar nav links, and recent-domain list items. Reuse design tokens and keep hover/active behavior unchanged. Done when keyboard navigation has a visible, consistent focus ring across these controls.

name: Fix empty plugin editor fields after save
description: When saving inline edits in Plugin manager, the form was being reset while remaining open, resulting in empty fields until re-open. Close inline editor on successful save/reset for plugin and theme edits and add regression test coverage.
result: Updated AdminPage callbacks so successful plugin/theme save now resets draft and exits edit mode (clears editing IDs), preventing empty inline fields after save. Added AdminPage integration test that saves an edited plugin and asserts editor closes. Verification: frontend tests pass (23/23) and frontend lint clean.

name: Allowlist /api/logs client events
description: Add a server-side allowlist and payload normalization for client-submitted /api/logs events. Reject unsupported event types and invalid payload shapes with validation errors. Acceptance: existing logging flows continue to work; unsupported types are rejected; server tests cover the new behavior.
result: Implemented /api/logs allowlist with payload normalization and validation by event type in server/src/index.js. Unsupported log types now return 400 and accepted types are shape-limited before persistence. Added regression test coverage for rejecting unsupported client log event types in server/src/index.test.js. Verification: server tests pass (23/23).

name: Reduce client log snapshot volume
description: Trim scan/homepage client log payloads so /api/logs stores compact summaries instead of full snapshots. Keep fields needed for admin diagnostics (domain, counts, durations, selected identifiers) while removing heavy nested objects. Acceptance: no regressions in scan/admin views; payload size materially reduced; tests updated if behavior changes.
result: Reduced client-side log payload size by trimming scan/homepage event bodies. In useScan, removed full snapshot from scan.complete and capped unsupported arrays; in useHomepageScan, replaced full snapshot with compact assetSample summary. Verification: frontend tests pass (21/21) and lint passes with one existing DataTable warning.

name: Stabilize frontend design system consistency
description:
Address the forensic UI audit findings in the React frontend by removing inconsistency hotspots and hardening the design system foundation.

Scope:
- Remove one-off inline style overrides used for spacing/sizing in component JSX.
- Eliminate class drift where JSX references classes that have no CSS definitions.
- Standardize key interaction states for keyboard focus visibility.
- Begin reducing style fragmentation without changing product behavior.

Implementation approach:
1) Fix highest-risk P0 issues first (undefined classes + inline spacing hacks + missing focus-visible states).
2) Keep visual direction intact (existing dark theme, tokens, layout patterns).
3) Add minimal, reusable utility classes only where needed to replace repeated inline styles.

Acceptance criteria:
- No remaining inline style objects for spacing in admin section headings/metadata.
- No JSX class names that are clearly intended styles but undefined in App.css.
- Core interactive controls (button, top nav link, sidebar nav link, recent-domain list item) show keyboard-visible focus style.
- Frontend lint/test baseline remains clean.
result: Completed the P0 design-system consistency pass by delivering all three child tasks: inline-style removal, JSX/CSS class drift cleanup, and focus-visible standardization. Implemented reusable classes in frontend/src/App.css, updated affected admin and scan components, and preserved existing visual language while reducing one-off styling behavior. Verification evidence: style object grep across JSX returned no matches and frontend lint run succeeded after changes.

name: Harden admin auth and SSRF protections
description: Implement API key auth for /api/admin/* and /api/logs* routes, enforce same-host redirect and sitemap URL protections to mitigate SSRF, and add regression tests. Also include related correctness fix for scan_runs first-run insertion and theme admin API error extraction. Acceptance: server and frontend tests pass; unauthorized admin/log requests return 401; cross-host redirects/sitemap child URLs are blocked.
result: Implemented API key middleware and enforced it on /api/admin/* and /api/logs*; added strict same-host validation for redirects and sitemap child/page URLs; fixed scan_runs first-entry insertion and theme API error parsing; optimized unsupported plugins read path to remove N+1 queries. Verification: pnpm --filter wp-json-discovery-server run test (22/22 passing), pnpm --filter frontend run test (21/21 passing), pnpm --filter frontend run lint (0 errors, 2 pre-existing warnings).

name: Phase 3 design-system cleanup
description: Finalize remaining audit debt by aligning button semantics, tokenizing overlay colors/shadows, unifying select/checkbox form controls, and extracting page-specific CSS out of App.css into style modules.
result: Completed remaining design-system cleanup pass. Aligned button intent by making primary the accent action and secondary the neutral surfaced action in a dedicated controls stylesheet, and updated domain scan submit to use Button variant/size instead of custom visual overrides. Unified select controls by introducing className select-input across all select fields and added checkbox-input styling for the history toggle. Extracted remaining hardcoded overlay/shadow color literals from App.css into root CSS variables in index.css. Modularized App.css by extracting shared controls into frontend/src/styles/components.controls.css and history/recent-domain page styles into frontend/src/styles/pages.history.css, imported from App.css. Verification: pnpm --filter frontend run lint passes (baseline-browser-mapping warning only).

commit.message: refactor: align controls and modularize page styles

name: Close class drift between JSX and App.css
description: Add or reconcile missing CSS class definitions referenced by JSX (e.g., table pagination button hooks and compact table/tag variants) so component APIs are explicit and predictable. Done when these classes are either defined intentionally or removed from JSX.

name: Phase 2 design system normalization
description:
Execute the next remediation wave after P0 consistency fixes.

Scope:
- Consolidate typography and spacing toward a tokenized scale in global CSS.
- Normalize text/url input usage onto the TextInput atom across admin/scan/history surfaces where feasible.
- Keep behavior and data flow unchanged while reducing style drift and ad-hoc form control patterns.

Acceptance criteria:
- Core typography/font-size and spacing primitives are tokenized and used in key foundational selectors.
- Admin/filter forms and registry modals primarily use TextInput for text/url fields.
- Lint passes and changes are committed with a Conventional Commit message.
result:
Completed the phase-2 normalization pass across frontend styles and form controls. Added tokenized typography/spacing/control primitives in index.css and applied them to foundational App.css selectors to reduce font-size and spacing drift. Standardized text/url controls onto the TextInput atom in history, admin filters, registry modals, sitemap controls, and table page input; added TextInput size variants (/) to support compact controls without one-off styling. Also retained prior consistency fixes in the same pass (focus-visible consistency and removal of inline style overrides). Verification: frontend lint passes via 
> frontend@0.0.0 lint /home/justin/code/wp-json-discovery/frontend
> eslint .; JSX inline style grep returns no matches.

commit.message: refactor: normalize form controls and design tokens

name: Reconcile unsupported list after plugin creation
description: When creating/updating plugins from the unsupported screen, refresh and reconcile unsupported indicators so newly supported entries disappear. Implement namespace cleanup in backend admin plugin write flows and filter asset-only hints by current supported plugin IDs/assetHints. Ensure snapshot refresh occurs after plugin mutations and add tests.
result: Implemented unsupported-list reconciliation across backend and frontend. Backend: added reconcileUnsupportedPluginsForRegistryEntry in server/src/utils/plugins.js and invoked it on admin plugin create/update in server/src/index.js so matching unsupported namespaces are removed. Frontend: updated useAdminQueries to refetch snapshot after plugin mutations; updated useAdminData to hide unsupported namespace/asset-only signals already covered by supported plugin namespaces, ids, or assetHints. Added tests: server index.test now verifies unsupported namespace cleanup after plugin creation; frontend useAdminData.test verifies covered signals are filtered; AdminPage integration test verifies snapshot refresh after create plugin action. Verification: server tests 24/24 pass, frontend tests 22/22 pass, frontend lint clean.
